metadata.title: Judo Club Geo de Genève - Judo School in Geneva for Children
metadata.description: Join Judo Club Geo de Genève. Our school has been a trusted institution in Geneva for over 11 years, offering judo classes for children aged 4 to 18.

hero.text1: Professional judo training for children — recognized in Geneva for over 11 years.

lessons.title1: Lesson Schedule – Judo Club Geo de Genève

componentOne.text: Our judo club, established in Geneva for 3 years, has become a key place for passionate youngsters. In a supportive and motivating environment, we teach much more than techniques: children learn respect, discipline, strength, and teamwork through judo. Join the Geo Judo adventure and become part of our big family!

componentTwo.text2: Guaranteed results, sports activities, and a friendly atmosphere
componentTwo.text4: Choosing a judo school means offering your child much more than a sport: it means giving them strong values like respect, self-confidence, and teamwork, while developing strength and focus.
componentTwo.text6: Development through camaraderie, sports activities, and discipline
componentTwo.text8: Last year, our students participated in many competitions and won well-deserved gold, silver, and bronze medals!

componentThree.text1: Georgi Kurtanidze, teacher and technical manager at Judo Club Geo de Genève. State-certified in martial arts judo and jiu-jitsu, certified Youth and Sport instructor, black belt 2nd Dan.
componentThree.text2: The knowledge and experience acquired over 11 years are the greatest asset of our school.

componentFour.title1: Order your uniform at Judo Club Geo de Genève
